Frame.RichText: This is bold, italic, bold-italic, underlined and struck-through text, with a highlighted phrase and some red words. Entities work too: A & B, 1 < 2.

A longer paragraph to show word wrapping across several lines: the quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog, and it keeps going so that the text must wrap when the window is narrow. Resize the window to watch it reflow. Visit the help page for details, or read the FAQ.

Mixed sizes share one baseline: small normal THIRTY big normal. This sentence is on a second line after an explicit
.
